Property: 511 Wild Turkey Ln, Normal, IL 61761-5640
Form type: FNM1004
GLA: N/A SF
Year built: 2022
Value: $299,900
Purpose: Purchase

Comparables #1, #3, and #4 are found in close proxmity to the subject property in Normal, IL. Due to a lack of recent comparable sales, Comparables #2, #3, and #4 are found in competing neighborhoods. Comparable #1 is the conjoining attached townhouse to the subject. It has not received any adjustments due to its similar design, condition, and quality. Comparable #2 has been included to bracket the subject's GLA and demonstrates the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its site size, superior quality, lack of a second garage space, and fireplace. Comparables #3 & #4 are older sales, but have not been applied with a market time adjustment due to their sale price reflecting the current market. Comparable #3 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its superior quality, lack of an above grade half bathroom, GLA, finished basement room count, lack of a patio, and fireplace. Comparable #4 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its location on Raab Rd, superior quality, lack of an above grade half bathroom, GLA, finished basement room count, lack of a patio, and fireplace. Most weight has been applied to Comparable #1 due to its similar design, condition, and quality to the subject. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Gross living area calculations are derived from the measurement of the subject property and reported on the dimension and sketch pages of this report. Depreciation is estimated by the appraiser observations.  The appraiser has adhered to ANSI standards in measuring the subject property.  Clarification of Intended Use and Intended User: Prairie State Bank & Trust  The Intended User of this appraisal report is the Lender/Client. The Intended Use is to evaluate the property that is the subject of this appraisal for a mortgage finance transaction, subject to the stated Scope of Work, purpose of the appraisal, reporting requirements of this appraisal report form, and Definition of Market Value. No additional Intended Users are identified by the appraiser.  Effective January 1st, 2010, the ETHICS RULE now requires an appraiser to disclose any prior services provided regarding the subject property within the three years preceding the new request / assignment. The appraiser has not appraised the property in the past three years preceeding this request.   This appraisal report adheres to the development and reporting options of The Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice (USPAP), FIRREA Title XI Appraisal Regulations and The Appraisal Independence Standards set forth by H.R 4173.  Geographical Competency Statement: This appraiser has geographic competency. The appraiser has prepared the appraisal in a familiar location and has spent sufficient time to understand the nuances of the local market and the supply and demand factors relating to the specific property type and the location involved.

Property: 209 N West St, Danvers, IL 61732-9341
Form type: FNM1004
GLA: N/A SF
Year built: 1914
Value: $305,000
Purpose: Purchase

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Danvers, IL, all comparables have been found in the Bloomington-Normal area. Danvers is a bedroom community of Bloomington-Normal and most residents commute for employment. The commute to Bloomington-Normal does not deter the market segment of potential buyers for the subject property, and allows for similar properties in Bloomington-Normal to be considered comparable. The subject property is of a significantly higher quality and design when compared to other properties in Danvers. All comparables have been given a location adjustment due to the ammenities Bloomington-Normal has to offer. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its age, GLA, lack of a walk-up attic, lack of a patio, and lack of a fireplace. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, GLA, basement finished room count, and walk-up attic finish. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, age, second full bathroom, basement room count, lack of a walk-up attic, attached garage, lack of a patio, and lack of a fence. See Comparable #4, #5 & #6.  06/07/2024 Appraiser to address the following red flags on SSR report: 1) The gross living area for the subject property (2492 sf) varies by more than 10% from public records (1331 sf) please confirm GLA is accurate. 2) The bedroom count for the subject property (4) varies from the public record value of (7) please confirm bedroom count is accurate.  McLean County Assessor lists the Total Base Area as: 1,331 sf. The assessor has only included the  first floor square footage.  MRED/MLS #12050028 supports the bedroom count of 4 and further supports the gross living area of 2492 sf. The appraiser has adhered to ANSI standards in measuring and inspecting the subject property.

They have not been applied with a market time adjustment. Comparable #1 was built in the 1960's, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in Le Roy. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, superior condition due to recent remodeling, garage space count, central air, and lack of a second covered porch.  See Comparable #4. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent sales, Comparables #1, #2, and #4 are older sales and are included to demonstrate the stability of the market in Le Roy, IL. They have not been applied with a market time adjustment. Due to a lack of recent sales, the subject's sale price is not bracketed. A search was made for comparable properties to bracket the subject's sale price, but none were found. Comparable #1 was built in the 1960's, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in Le Roy. Adm. Code 1410 and are not to be considered a home inspection or home inspection report." Property: 213 E Charles St, Mc Lean, IL 61754
Form type: FNM1004
GLA: N/A SF
Year built: 1973
Value: $210,000
Purpose: Purchase

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales within McLean, IL, the search was expanded to include other competing rural communities. Additionally, it was necessary to analyze sales occurring up to 18 months prior to the effective date to identify sales that reflect market support for the premium paid for dwellings of similar GLA, quality, and condition within the subject's market area. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar location, design, age, and condition as the subject. Due to recent market trends the comparables were applied with a market time adjustment of 7.0% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. The subject property is of superior quality and condition relative to typical ranch-style dwellings in the McLean, IL market area. Market participants seeking ranch homes in this area demonstrate a willingness to pay a premium for properties that reflect similar quality and condition. The subject's finished basement is of above-average quality and contributes additional value, as this level of finish is supported by comparable sales and recognized by buyers in the market. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, and lack of a shed. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, view, quality, age, bathroom count, and deck count. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, view, bathroom count, basement finished room count, deck, patio, and lack of a fence. Comparable #4 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, and garage space count. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, lack of a fence, and lack of a shed. Comparable #6 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, view, quality, age, GLA, and basement finished room count. Comparable #7 has been included to bracket the subject's site size and bedroom count. It has been adjusted for its site size, quality, condition, garage space count, and lack of a shed. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in the subject's immediate market area, an extensive search was made to find recent comparable sales in competing rural areas that would appeal to a similar market segment as the subject. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, site size, quality, and condition. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 4.2% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, fireplace count, outbuilding, and accessory dwelling unit. The sqft, quality, and condition of the ADU of Comparable #1 was considered and a significant adjustment was made to account for its contributory value. However, an ADU is atypical for properties in a rural location and did not appear to have a significant impact on the marketability of Comparable #1. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, heating/cooling system, lack of an enclosed porch, lack of a fireplace, and outbuilding. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location, view, bathroom count, GLA, walkout basement, heating/cooling system, garage space count, patio, and fireplace count. Comparable #4 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a finished basement, heating/cooling system, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, fireplace count, and shed. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its condition, bathroom count, GLA, walkout basement, basement finished room count, heating/cooling system, garage space count, patio, and fireplace count. Comparable #6 has been adjusted for its age, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, heating/cooling system, garage space count, fireplace count, and quonset shed. Comparable #7 has been included to bracket the subject's age. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a main floor bedroom, heating/cooling system, garage space count, fireplace count, outbuilding, and fence. Comparable #7's reported GLA on public record does not include the finished attic area currently utilized as a bedroom. 301 Ireland Grove Rd, Bloomington, IL  was considered to bracket the subject's above grade bathroom count, but was deemed to be an uncomparable recent sale. An extenstive search was made to find a recent comparable sale to bracket the subject's GLA, but none were identified. Based on the comparables' sale price per gross living area, it appears that the subject sold below market value. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value. Comparable #2 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a walkout basement in the market area and a Sale Price/GLA similar to the subject. It has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement full bathroom and second bedroom, patio, deck, fireplace count, lack of a sauna, and lack of a shed. Comparable #3 has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design, quality, and condition in Farmer City. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, lack of a basement, patio, fireplace count, lack of a sauna, and attached shed. Comparable #4 is a recently renovated house, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design in close proximity to the subject property. It has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, condition due to recent renovations, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, sunroom, deck, fireplace count, lack of a sauna, and outbuilding. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Comparables #2 & #3, and #4 are older sales, but have not been given a market time adjustment due to the stability of sale prices in the market area. Comparable #1 is a recent sale and was included to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design, condition, quality, and view to the subject property. It has been adjusted for its view of agricultural land, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of an enclosed porch and deck, fireplace count, fenced-in yard, and shed. Comparable #2 has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design in Crestwicke. It has been adjusted for its site size, view of agricultural land, inferior condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement and finished room count, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch and deck, and fireplace count. Comparable #3 differs in design from the subject, but has been included to show the marketability of houses in Crestwicke with a similar GLA to the subject. It has been adjusted for its site size, view, inferior condition, GLA, basement and finished room count, lack of an enclosed porch and patio, and fireplace count. Comparable #4 differs from the subject in design, but has been icluded to bracket the subject's sale price and further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar GLA to the subject. It has been adjusted for its site size, view, age, GLA, basement and finished room count, garage space count, fireplace count, fenced-in yard, and backyard shed. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.
